name: Greens Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Regular, light or cholesterol-free mayonnaise
Parsley, fresh dill, celery leaves, scallion tops, chopped green pepper
Salt to taste (do not use salt with anchovy)
recipeInstructions:
1. For the dressing: Puree mayonnaise, yogurt, lemon juice, sugar, mixed greens, salt, and pepper in a blender or food processor. Add anchovy if desired. Cover and refrigerate until flavors are well blended.
2. For the salad: Combine chicory, curly lettuce, baby spinach leaves, watercress, and ribbons of kale.
